testcase.name: runApiTest[TestCase(caseId=LOGIN_002, caseName=密码错误, apiName=认证模块, method=POST, url=/api/login, templateFile=login.json, headers=, encrypt=0, decrypt=0, extract=, expectedCode=401, expectedField=message, expectedValue=密码错误, variables={username=admin, password=wrongPwd, loginType=user})](2)

runApiTest[TestCase(caseId=USER_001, caseName=查询用户列表, apiName=用户模块, method=GET, url=/api/users, templateFile=empty.json, headers=, encrypt=0, decrypt=0, extract=, expectedCode=200, expectedField=[0].username, expectedValue=admin, variables={})](3)

runApiTest[TestCase(caseId=PROD_001, caseName=查询商品列表, apiName=商品模块, method=GET, url=/api/products, templateFile=empty.json, headers=, encrypt=0, decrypt=0, extract=, expectedCode=200, expectedField=[0].name, expectedValue=2B铅笔, variables={})](4)
